title: Generate R program to derive ADADAS (ADAS-Cog (completers))

inputs.prompt: Write an R program using the admiral package to create the ADADAS (ADAS-Cog (completers)) analysis dataset. The program must: (1) Read relevant SDTM source datasets and merge with ADSL, (2) Derive key variables: COMP24FL, ANL01FL, DTYPE, AVISITN, (3) Handle completer population flag, analysis flag for completers, LOCF sensitivity analysis, (4) Apply ADaM variable attributes and metadata per specification, (5) Output xpt dataset with proper labels. The dataset contains approximately 2718 records.
